services/api-gateway/src/main/java/com/e.general_idea: Replaced the deprecated Eureka-specific annotation with the generic Spring Cloud Discovery Client annotation to align with modern Spring Cloud standards.
Removed the explicit MongoDB auditing annotation, likely relying on auto-configuration or other mechanisms in the newer stack.
Removed the explicit transaction management annotation, relying on Spring Boot's default auto-configuration for transaction management.
Removed the Feign client enabling annotation, potentially migrating to a different HTTP client strategy or relying on auto-configuration.
Added a bean definition for ProtobufModule to enable Jackson serialization/deserialization of Protocol Buffers.

services/order-service/src/main/java/com.general_idea: Renamed the package from 'com.example.Orders' to 'com.example.orders' to follow Java naming conventions.
Replaced specific Netflix Eureka and OpenFeign annotations with the generic Spring Cloud Discovery Client annotation to decouple from specific implementations.

services/order-service/src/test/java/com.general_idea: Renamed the package from com.example.Orders to com.example.orders to follow Java naming conventions.

services/search-service/src/main/java/co.general_idea: Rename package from com.example.Search to com.example.search to follow Java naming conventions.
Enable service discovery by adding the EnableDiscoveryClient annotation.

services/api-gateway/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.7.18 to 3.3.6 to align with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3 ecosystem.
Set the target Java version property to 21 to enable compilation for the new JDK.
Update Spring Cloud version to 2023.0.3 to be compatible with Spring Boot 3.
Remove MongoDB starter dependency as it is no longer used in this service.
Add Redis starter dependency to replace or supplement data storage capabilities.
Remove OpenFeign starter dependency, likely replacing it with gRPC or other mechanisms.
Remove Spring Security starter dependency from the project.
Replace springdoc-openapi-ui with springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui to support Spring Boot 3.
Add gRPC client Spring Boot starter to enable gRPC communication.
Add gRPC stub dependency for client-side gRPC calls.
Add gRPC protobuf dependency for protocol buffer support.
Add javax.annotation-api to resolve missing annotations removed from Java 11+ module system.
Add Jackson datatype for protobuf to handle serialization/deserialization.
Add OS Maven plugin extension to detect OS for native dependencies.
Add protobuf-maven-plugin to compile .proto files into Java classes.
Update the project description to reflect its role as an API Gateway/BFF.

services/order-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.7.18 to 3.3.6 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
Update the Java version property from 11 to 21 to reflect the target runtime.
Upgrade Spring Cloud version to 2023.0.3 to be compatible with Spring Boot 3.x.
Define a specific Lombok version property for consistent dependency management.
Switch data persistence from MongoDB to JPA/SQL by replacing the starter dependency.
Add PostgreSQL JDBC driver to support the new JPA data source.
Remove Spring Cloud OpenFeign dependency, likely replacing it with gRPC or other mechanisms.
Add Spring Kafka dependency for asynchronous messaging capabilities.
Add Spring Data Redis dependency for caching or session management.
Remove explicit springdoc-openapi-ui dependency, likely relying on Spring Boot 3 auto-configuration or removing API docs.
Explicitly pin Lombok version to 1.18.32 to ensure compatibility with Java 21.
Add gRPC server starter to enable gRPC service endpoints.
Add gRPC stub dependency for client-side gRPC communication.
Add gRPC protobuf dependency for protocol buffer serialization.
Add javax.annotation-api to replace removed Java EE annotations in Java 11+ (required for gRPC/Lombok compatibility).
Add OS Maven plugin to detect operating system for native dependency resolution (e.g., protoc).
Add protobuf-maven-plugin to compile .proto files into Java classes during build.
Update maven-compiler-plugin to version 3.13.0 and set source/target to 21.
Configure Lombok as an annotation processor in the compiler plugin to ensure proper code generation.

services/search-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.7.x to 3.3.x to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
Update the target Java version property from 11 to 21.
Upgrade Spring Cloud version to 2023.0.3 (Leyton) to be compatible with Spring Boot 3.
Remove the explicit spring-boot.version property as it is now managed by the parent POM.
Replace the Solr client dependency with Spring Data Elasticsearch starter.
Add Spring Kafka dependency for message brokering support.
Add Netflix Eureka client starter for service discovery.
Add gRPC server Spring Boot starter for gRPC service support.
Add gRPC stub dependency for client-side gRPC calls.
Add gRPC protobuf dependency for protocol buffer support.
Remove deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies which are incompatible with Spring Boot 3.
Add javax.annotation-api to replace annotations removed from the JDK in Java 11+ and often required by legacy libraries or gRPC.
Add OS Maven plugin extension to detect OS-specific classifiers for native dependencies.
Add protobuf-maven-plugin to compile .proto files into Java classes during the build.

.gitignore.general_idea: Added hydrate.py to gitignore to exclude a Python script from version control.
Added ProjectPlan.md to gitignore to exclude project planning documentation.
Added ProjectGoal.md to gitignore to exclude project goal documentation.
Added RunServices.md to gitignore to exclude service running instructions.
Added dataset directory to gitignore to exclude data files from version control.

README.md.general_idea: Rewrite the project overview to reflect the new architectural patterns (gRPC, CQRS, Event Sourcing) and remove references to the old learning-focused narrative.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced 'comprehensive marketplace platform... Vue.js frontend' with 'high-performance, event-driven e-commerce platform... gRPC, CQRS, Event Sourcing'.

README.md.general_idea: Replace the old ASCII architecture diagram with a new one reflecting the current service topology, ports, and communication protocols (gRPC, Kafka).
README.md.human_impl: Swapped the old box-and-arrow diagram for a new one showing API Gateway, Order/Catalog/Search services, and their respective databases and event streams.

README.md.general_idea: Remove documentation sections related to the Vue.js frontend, which appears to have been removed or significantly altered in the new version.
README.md.human_impl: Deleted 'Frontend Service (Port 8080)' section and associated project structure details for the frontend.

README.md.general_idea: Update the service details section to reflect the new microservices (Order, Catalog, Search, Discovery) and their technologies (PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Elasticsearch, Eureka).
README.md.human_impl: Replaced old service descriptions (User, Merchant, Cart) with new ones (Order, Catalog, Search, Discovery) and updated tech stacks.

README.md.general_idea: Update the prerequisites section to specify Java 21 and add Docker/Python requirements for the new infrastructure setup.
README.md.human_impl: Changed 'Java' requirement to 'Java 21' and added 'Docker & Docker Compose' and 'Python 3'.

README.md.general_idea: Rewrite the installation and run instructions to match the new service startup sequence and infrastructure dependencies.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced old manual service start instructions with a new sequence involving docker-compose, discovery server, and specific service jars.

README.md.general_idea: Update the API endpoints section to reflect the new gateway routes and remove obsolete endpoints.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced detailed endpoint lists for each service with a concise list of gateway endpoints.
